'''Ompersan''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. It was the site of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] records center.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
*<!-- 2012-04-03 -->''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''
